info.description: Invoice management and payment platform API

parameters.name: search

Returns full user details for admin view

parameters.description: Comment data (include token for guest access)
parameters.name: body

post.summary: Add emoji reaction to a comment

delete.summary: Remove emoji reaction from a comment

get.summary: Get invoice breakdown by status (pie chart data)
Full-text search invoices for current user

parameters.description: true to approve, false to reject
parameters.name: approve
